keyCharacter: Alphabetic character {{ character }}, typically used to compose keyboard shortcuts
keyFunction: Function key {{ character }}, often used for global functions depending on the operating system and its version
keyNumber: Numeric character {{ character }}, typically used to compose keyboard shortcuts
modAlt: Alt key (alternative), often used for system shortcuts
modControl: Control or Ctrl key, used in many shortcuts
modMeta: Meta key, Windows ⊞ on Windows or Command ⌘ on macOS
modShift: Shift key, used for uppercase letters
numPadEnter: Enter key to confirm an action from the numeric keypad
numPadNumber: Number {{ character }} from the numeric keypad
specCapsLock: Special key Caps Lock (generally avoided in keyboard shortcuts)
specEnter: Special key Enter to confirm an action
specTab: Special key Tab to switch focus between elements
